_comment: Buffs, debuffs and statuses. Applied by items, sleep, events, etc. 'perHour' effects tick each game hour while active. 'onApply' fires once. Duration is in game hours. Add your own freely.

well_rested.name: Well Rested
well_rested.desc: A full night's sleep. Rare and precious.

exhausted.name: Exhausted
exhausted.toast: You can barely keep your eyes open.

hungover.name: Hungover
hungover.toast: Everything is too loud and too bright.

carb_load.name: Carb Loaded
carb_load.toast: Cold pizza: the breakfast of degenerates.

liquid_confidence.name: Liquid Confidence
liquid_confidence.desc: You feel like a rockstar. Results may vary.
